common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

admin.pageDescription: Manage your fleet subscription, drivers, and compliance.

enterpriseContact.fallbackAlertLine1: Contact us at {{email}} to upgrade to Enterprise.
enterpriseContact.messageIntro: I'd like to discuss the Enterprise plan for our fleet:

cashback.heading: Cashback available
cashback.body: Applied automatically as a refund on your next renewal charge. Expires {{date}}.

subscriptionHistory.heading: Subscription history
subscriptionHistory.errorAuth: Please sign in again to view your history.

trialExtension.title: Need more time?
trialExtension.subtitle: One-time, up to 7 extra days.
trialExtension.explainOnetime: We'll add up to 7 days to your trial. This is a one-time courtesy — after this you'll need to pick a plan to keep using FTPGo.
trialExtension.commentLabel: Anything else you'd like us to know?
trialExtension.commentPlaceholder: Optional — what would help you decide?
trialExtension.doneBody_one: Added 1 day to your trial. New end date: {{date}}.
trialExtension.doneBody_other: Added {{count}} days to your trial. New end date: {{date}}.
trialExtension.errorAuth: Please sign in again to extend your trial.

billingDetailsCard.heading: Invoice details
billingDetailsCard.subheading: Used on every receipt and tax invoice we issue.

pauseSubscription.title: Pause subscription?
pauseSubscription.subtitle: We'll pause at the end of your current billing cycle.
pauseSubscription.explainTiming: Your subscription stays active until the end of the current paid period. After that, billing pauses and your status changes to Paused.
pauseSubscription.explainBilling: While paused you keep your data and settings, but features are restricted just like an inactive subscription. You can resume any time to restart billing immediately.
pauseSubscription.doneBody: We've recorded your request. You'll keep access until the end of your current billing cycle, then your subscription will pause automatically. Resume anytime from this tab.
pauseSubscription.errorAuth: Please sign in again to pause your subscription.

resumeSubscription.title: Resume subscription?
resumeSubscription.subtitle: Resume billing now and restore full access.
resumeSubscription.explainTiming: Your subscription will restart immediately on your existing plan. The next charge happens at your original billing cadence.
resumeSubscription.explainBilling: Your card on file will be used for the next charge. Update billing details first if anything has changed since you paused.
resumeSubscription.doneBody: Welcome back. Your subscription is now active and your next charge will land on the regular billing cadence.
resumeSubscription.errorAuth: Please sign in again to resume your subscription.
resumeSubscription.pausedBody: Your subscription is paused. No charges are happening; your data and settings are preserved. Resume any time to restart billing.

cancelSubscription.title: Cancel subscription?
cancelSubscription.subtitle: We'll cancel at the end of your current billing cycle.
cancelSubscription.explainCycleEnd: Your subscription stays active until the end of the current paid period. You won't be charged again, and you keep access through that date.
cancelSubscription.explainDataRetention: Fleet data, drivers, and trip history are kept on file. You can resubscribe anytime; nothing is deleted just because billing stopped.
cancelSubscription.commentLabel: Anything else you'd like us to know?
cancelSubscription.commentPlaceholder: Optional — what would have made you stay?
cancelSubscription.doneBody: We've recorded your request. You'll keep access until the end of your current billing cycle, then your subscription will become inactive automatically. Thank you for being a customer.
cancelSubscription.errorAuth: Please sign in again to cancel your subscription.

annualUnlock.heading: Annual billing — coming up
annualUnlock.bodyCountdown_one: Annual billing unlocks in {{count}} day ({{date}}). Save {{pct}}% per year when you switch.
annualUnlock.bodyCountdown_other: Annual billing unlocks in {{count}} days ({{date}}). Save {{pct}}% per year when you switch.
annualUnlock.bodyPending: Annual billing unlocks on your next monthly renewal. Save {{pct}}% per year when you switch.

auth.errorFleetNameRequired: Fleet Name is required for sign up
auth.errorNetwork: Cannot reach the server. Please check your internet connection.
auth.errorServerWithStatus: Server error (HTTP {{status}}). The fleet-signup function may not be deployed yet.
auth.errorPostSignUpSignIn: Account created but sign-in failed. Please use the Login tab.

checkout.softCapNudge: Fleets of {{cap}}+ vehicles get custom pricing and a dedicated CSM on the Enterprise plan. Consider contacting sales for a better rate.
checkout.annualLockTooltip: Annual billing unlocks after 3 months on monthly
checkout.annualLockHelp: Annual billing unlocks after your fleet has been active on monthly billing for 3 months.
checkout.gstinHelp: Adding your GSTIN lets you claim Input Tax Credit on this subscription. We'll print these details on every invoice — leave blank if you're not GST-registered.
checkout.billingEmailFormatError: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. accounts@company.com).

pricing.planNotInCatalog: Plan "{{plan}}" is not available for online checkout. Contact support.

trialBanner.suspendedMessage: Your last payment didn't go through. Update your billing details to restore full access — your data is safe in the meantime.
trialBanner.expiredMessage: Your subscription has expired and features are locked. Pick a plan to restore access — your data is preserved.
trialBanner.graceMessage: Your subscription has expired. You have a 7-day grace period — upgrade now to avoid losing access.
trialBanner.trialMessageExpired: Your free trial has expired. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.trialMessageMinutes: Your free trial expires in less than an hour. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.trialMessageHours_one: Your free trial expires in 1 hour. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.trialMessageHours_other: Your free trial expires in {{count}} hours. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.trialMessageDays_one: Your free trial ends in 1 day. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.trialMessageDays_other: Your free trial ends in {{count}} days. Upgrade to keep full access.
trialBanner.renewalReminderMessage_one: Your annual subscription renews tomorrow. Make sure your payment method on file is up to date.
trialBanner.renewalReminderMessage_other: Your annual subscription renews in {{count}} days. Make sure your payment method on file is up to date.

invoices.emptyHelp: We'll issue a GST tax invoice automatically each time a paid subscription is charged. Make sure your GSTIN is on file before your first payment to claim Input Tax Credit.
invoices.chipPreGstTooltip: Issued before our GST registration — no tax components

viewer.subtitleReceipt: Pre-GST registration — issued for accounting reference.
viewer.statusCancelled: CANCELLED — this invoice has been voided.
viewer.statusDormant: Issued before our GST registration was active. Treated as a non-GST receipt — no Input Tax Credit available on this invoice.
viewer.systemGenerated: This is a system-generated invoice and does not require a signature.
